summary: Iteration 8: Edit Functionality Polish + First-Time Setup Screen. All 12 backend tests pass (100%). All 17 frontend feature requirements verified (100%). Full end-to-end edit save flow working (badge, readOnly serial, Update Record button, PUT to backend, success toast, dashboard redirect with updated data).

features_verified.edit_form_prepopulates_all_fields: ✅ serial_no=TEST-BATCH-001, manufacturer=HP, modal=EliteBook 840, recipient_name=Test Recipient all pre-populated
features_verified.serial_no_readonly_in_edit: ✅ Serial No. field has readonly attribute and cursor:not-allowed style in edit mode
features_verified.editing_badge_visible: ✅ data-testid=editing-badge present in action bar with text 'Editing: TEST-BATCH-001' (amber background)
features_verified.editing_badge_not_in_add_mode: ✅ Editing badge (data-testid=editing-badge) NOT found in /add mode
features_verified.save_button_update_record: ✅ Save button text is 'Update Record' in edit mode
features_verified.save_button_save_record: ✅ Save button text is 'Save Record' in add mode
features_verified.put_preserves_created_at: ✅ PUT preserves created_at and created_by from original record
features_verified.put_403_technician_donated: ✅ PUT returns 403 when technician tries to set status=Donated
features_verified.put_403_technician_sold: ✅ PUT returns 403 when technician tries to set status=Sold
features_verified.put_200_technician_in_stock: ✅ PUT returns 200 when technician sets non-restricted status (In Stock)
features_verified.setup_status_false: ✅ GET /api/setup/status returns {setup_required: false} when users exist
features_verified.setup_init_403: ✅ POST /api/setup/init returns 403 with 'Setup already completed' message when users exist
features_verified.setup_endpoints_public: ✅ Both /api/setup/status and /api/setup/init are public (no auth required)
features_verified.login_no_redirect_to_setup: ✅ LoginPage does NOT redirect to /setup when setup_required=false
features_verified.setup_page_redirects_to_login: ✅ SetupPage at /setup correctly redirects to /login when setup_required=false (correct behavior)
features_verified.setup_page_form_renders: ✅ SetupPage renders username, password, confirm password fields (verified with mocked setup_required=true)
features_verified.setup_page_submit_disabled_initially: ✅ Submit button disabled when form is empty/rules not met
features_verified.setup_page_password_rules_green: ✅ All 4 password rules turn green when criteria met (8 chars, uppercase, number, passwords match)
features_verified.setup_page_submit_enabled: ✅ Submit button enabled when all rules met and username >= 3 chars
features_verified.e2e_edit_save_flow: ✅ Full edit flow: badge visible → fields pre-populated → Update Record click → PUT succeeds → 'Record updated successfully' toast → redirect to dashboard → data reflected in table

critical_code_review_comments: SetupPage correctly calls GET /api/setup/status on mount and redirects to /login if setup_required=false - prevents unauthorized access to setup form
IntakeFormPage: editing-badge only renders when isEdit=true (Boolean(serialNo)) - clean implementation
PUT endpoint correctly preserves created_at/created_by from existing doc: update_doc['created_at'] = existing.get('created_at', ...) - correct pattern
startup() event no longer auto-creates admin user - first-time setup is handled entirely through /setup UI flow and /api/setup/init endpoint
seed_data_creation: Created TEST-EDIT-ITER8-001 (HP/ProBook 450/In Stock) for backend PUT tests; cleaned up automatically. Created test_tech_iter8 technician for RBAC tests. TEST-BATCH-001 recipient name temporarily changed to 'Test Recipient Updated' during e2e test; restored to 'Test Recipient' after test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 all features verified: (1) Edit form polish: editing-badge (data-testid=editing-badge) shows 'Editing: {serial_no}' in amber when isEdit=true, Save button says 'Update Record' in edit mode / 'Save Record' in add mode, Serial No field has readonly attr in edit mode. PUT /api/computers/{serial_no} preserves created_at/created_by. (2) Setup: GET /api/setup/status public, returns {setup_required: bool}. POST /api/setup/init public, 403 when users exist. SetupPage auto-redirects to /login if setup_required=false. SetupPage has 4 password rules that turn green. Current records: TEST-BATCH-001 (HP/EliteBook 840/In Stock/Test Recipient), UI-FORM-SAVE-001 (Dell/Latitude 5490/In Stock/Test Edit User). Admin: admin/Admin@12345.
